topic: Why leakage is born at the feature engineering stage
scope: The book's reason for making leakage a recurring callout.
key_concepts: Data leakage is practically non-existent in model selection or hyperparameter tuning; it almost exclusively happens during data pre-processing and feature engineering.
The act of deriving aggregate features (mean, counts, ratios) is the primary gateway for contamination.
Applying feature transformations on the full tabular dataset before partitioning it guarantees train-test contamination.
Because it happens during feature extraction, enforcing 'praktik pipeline yang benar' (proper pipeline discipline) is essential.

definitions.definition: Disiplin merancang urutan transformasi di dalam struktur isolasi yang ketat agar tidak terjadi kebocoran informasi antar partisi pengujian.

examples: A target encoding step requires looking at the target column. If done globally before a formal split, every feature value holds a cheat sheet to the answers.

relations.builds_toward: ch02_s05 (how to prevent it through splits)

exclusions: Do not re-explain the definitions of train-test contamination.
